PurchaseOfferInstructions:
(1) Add new Purchase Offers by filling in the fields and pressing the 'Submit Purchase Offer' button.
(2) Select a saved Purchase Offer from the list to update or delete it
(3) Use 'Load Previous Purchase Offer' to retrieve the info of the last Purchase Offer entry
(4) All fields must be filled before submitting.
BadEntries: All fields must be filled to record a Purchase Offer
OfferSelect: Select a Purchase Offer for more details
DeleteRequest: Delete this Purchase Offer from the records?
